text:
「ゴロンゾランに勝てば恋愛にも勝つ」
なーんてジンクスが流行ってるみたい！
わたしも売り文句を考えようかな……

「ゴロンゾランに勝ったアークスが
　作ったチョコで、恋愛成就！」とか？
実際、恋愛には勇気が必要よね。

こういうウワサ話を使って
最後の一押しのお手伝いを、って
思ってさ。

貴方に頼ってばっかりだけど……
みんなの幸せのため
どうか、

A rumor has been going around - if you defeat
Goron Zran, you'll be successful in love!
...Y'know, I betcha I could spin that into a sales pitch...

The ARKS who defeated Goron Zran is involved
in making the chocolate that'll fulfill your
desires! ...You do need courage for love, after all.

I just thought we could use this rumor to give
us one final push.

Sorry I'm always pinning these things on your
shoulders, but... Hey, one more, for the sake of
everyone's happiness?
